facebook.caption: POV: you skip the main beach strip and end up at Ong Lang. Quieter. Rockier. Way less crowded. The kind of beach where you actually put your phone down. 4.1 stars across 731 reviews and most tourists drive straight past it. North Phu Quoc beaches hit different. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Waves coming in at Ong Lang beach while the main strips are packed. This is north Phu Quoc. Fewer sunbeds, more breathing room. 731 people rated it 4.1 stars and it still flies under the radar.

instagram.caption: POV: you took the road north and found Ong Lang. Rockier, quieter, no crowds. 4.1★ 731 reviews. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Walked past the resort strip. Ended up at Ong Lang. Big difference. #PhuQuoc #OngLang

tiktok.caption: Took the wrong turn and found this beach in Phu Quoc. No regrets. #PhuQuoc #OngLang #VietnamTravel

scenes: Pan along tree-lined coast, no resort towers
Close-up: bare feet on wet sand
